# Interop Test Certificates

Test certificates for verifying interoperability with the
[Go demo tool](https://github.com/davidben/merkle-tree-certs/tree/main/demo).

## cert_1.pem – cert_15.pem

Generated by `tests/interop_gen.rs` using s2n-quic-mtc's own tree builder.
16-entry tree (indices 0–15), log ID `32473.1`, landmark certs with
inclusion proofs to the full tree subtree [0, 16).

See `metadata.txt` for the tree parameters and subtree hash.

## cert_11_0.pem, cert_11_1.pem, cert_11_2.pem, cert_22_0.pem, cert_2025_0.pem

Generated by the Go demo tool (`go run . -config mtc.json -out out`)
from commit `7fecd363` of
[davidben/merkle-tree-certs](https://github.com/davidben/merkle-tree-certs).

Config: `demo/mtc.json` (plants-02 format, log ID `32473.1`, 3 ECDSA cosigners).
These certs exercise standalone verification with cosignatures and
landmark verification across different subtree ranges.
